title: Looking for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
